title: Artificer’s Skies
description: Artificer’s Skies – master mystical arts and mechanical marvels as you shape the worlds into your own creation.
body:
Artificer’s Skies – master mystical arts and mechanical marvels as you shape the skies into your own creation. Recreate the laws of Orrin’s new home world, where magic and machine intertwine to define reality itself.

This modpack for the Artificer’s Skies Let’s Play series You can watch me play it here: (coming soon)

The pack is built around a few big mods that let the magic of creation fly:

Create

Ars Nouveau

Armourer's Workshop

...with a host of supporting mods.

P.S. Quite a few mods in the pack are designed to help you build and record stories of your own. So be creative and share your work — this world always needs more stories to connect us to one another.

-----------------

I’m just making this pack to spread the fun I’m having — I did very little work to set up the pack itself. If you’d like to support anyone, please consider looking up how to support the individual mod makers — they are the ones who made all of this possible.

-----------------

Most mods are available here on Modrinth, but a few were included in this pack via manual download from CurseForge:

Ars Creo → https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-creo (Licensed under GPL-3.0)

Starbunclemania → https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starbunclemania (Licensed under LGPL-3.0)

ReForgedPlayMod → https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reforgedplay-mod (licensed under GNU LGPL v3)

The included save file uses the Skyblock Classic Edition 6.1.0 world by VoidBlock → https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/voidblock-skyblock-reinterpretation (licensed under MIT License 1.0.0)

P.P.S you need to be in a server or lan server with consol comands on to start the save then you can go back to normal after spawn.

These mods are already included in the pack — you do not need to download them separately. Please consider supporting the individual mod authors!
